title: Approval of FY2024 Annual Financial Results
description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2024 annual financial statements as presented by the CFO and reviewed by the Audit Committee.

title: Declaration of Interim Dividend FY2024
description: The Board resolved to declare an interim dividend of ZMW 220 million for FY2024, subject to Ministry of Finance approval.

title: Approval of Privatisation Mandate for Two Portfolio Companies
description: The Board resolved to approve the privatisation mandate for Zambia Forestry and Forest Industries Corporation (ZAFFICO) and Nitrogen Chemicals of Zambia (NCZ), and to appoint transaction advisors.

title: Emergency Bridging Facility to Zambia Railways
description: The Board resolved to approve a ZMW 150 million emergency bridging facility to Zambia Railways Limited, subject to Ministry of Finance concurrence and execution of a facility agreement.

title: Approval of ZAFCO Acquisition Terms
description: The Board resolved to approve the terms and conditions for the acquisition of a 60% stake in Zambia Agro-Food Company (ZAFCO) at a consideration of ZMW 85 million.
